race.description: Tle Thanks Burndy Cable Support Super Maiden Handicap
race.comment: AUDITORY (2) resumed from a spell with a narrow defeat over 1300m at Hawkesbury. Draws to advantage and is sure to keep improving for a leading metro stable. Hard to beat in this suitable race. TUSCANY (1) resumes and is up to this if presented on song. Has two trials under the saddle and will race forward from an inside gate. Has been gelded and is a winning chance on his best figures. SPANISH ARTIST (12) resumes for a top Sydney barn and has been well educated. Is likely to skip over and race handy and is a betting watch. GIANLUCA (4) ran in a small field here on debut, beaten 1.75 lengths over 1000m. Has an awkward gate, but with the extra fitness, he can get some of the money. PERCHANCE (11) debuts for the local Beer yard and won her latest trial at the track. Buckley sticks from that, and she's likely to race well.
